description: Canonical spec for care reason display surfaces — documents what security, filtering, and sensitive content redaction each surface must apply. Shared between Flutter (Dart) and web (TypeScript).

conventions.accessControl: 'group_filter' = filter care reasons by group membership (admins see all, public groups visible to all, private groups require membership). 'single_item_check' = verify user can access a specific care reason. 'none' = no access control needed.
conventions.sensitiveRedaction: 'admin_or_group_admin' = admins and group admins see sensitive content; all others see redacted placeholder text. 'none' = no sensitive content displayed on this surface.
conventions.filters: Array of filter types that must be available on this surface. Each platform implements these filters but the set must match.

surfaces.name: Care Reasons List
surfaces.description: Main paginated care reason list with filtering, search, and view modes (table, cards)

surfaces.name: Care Reason Detail
surfaces.description: Full detail view for a single care reason including notes, related tasks, and group tags

surfaces.name: Care Reason Edit Form
surfaces.description: Edit form for an existing care reason. Must verify user can access the care reason before showing the form.

surfaces.name: Dashboard — Feed
surfaces.description: Activity feed showing care reasons alongside completed tasks. Care reasons shown in feed variant cards.

surfaces.name: Dashboard — KPI Cards
surfaces.description: Numeric count of active care reasons. No content exposed.

surfaces.name: Member Detail
surfaces.description: Care reasons related to a specific church member, shown on the member detail page

surfaces.name: Task Detail — Linked Care Reason
surfaces.description: A task may link to a care reason. The care reason title is displayed on the task detail page.

surfaces.name: Task Detail Drawer — Linked Care Reason
surfaces.description: Desktop drawer variant of task detail. Same care reason title display.

surfaces.name: Task Form — Care Reason Picker
surfaces.description: Task create/edit form includes a care reason picker. Only accessible care reasons should appear.

surfaces.name: Reports
surfaces.description: Aggregate care reason statistics (active count, resolved count, avg resolution days). No individual content exposed.
